stories.title: The Missing Homework
stories.story:
Every morning, Layla followed the same routine: she woke up at seven o'clock, brushed her teeth, ate breakfast, and packed her school bag. But one Tuesday morning, everything went wrong.

"Where is my homework?" Layla shouted, searching through her bag. She had finished her math homework the night before and left it on her desk, but now it was nowhere to be found. Her mother helped her search the bedroom, the kitchen, and even the living room, but the homework had disappeared.

Just as Layla was about to give up and leave for school without it, she heard a strange sound coming from under the sofa. She looked closely and found her little brother's puppy chewing on a crumpled piece of paper. It was her homework, covered in tiny bite marks!

Layla laughed instead of getting angry. She quickly rewrote the answers she remembered, and her teacher understood when she explained what had happened. From that day on, Layla always kept her homework safely inside her bag — far away from curious puppies.

stories.title: The Talent Show
stories.story:
Every day after school, Youssef practiced his guitar for an hour. His school was having a talent show, and he desperately wanted to perform, but he was too shy to sign up.

His best friend Karim noticed how much Youssef loved playing music. "You're really good," Karim said one afternoon. "Why don't you join the talent show?" Youssef shook his head. "What if everyone laughs at me?" he asked quietly.

Karim didn't give up. Every day, he encouraged Youssef a little more, until finally, Youssef agreed to sign up — but only if Karim stayed backstage with him. On the night of the show, Youssef's hands were shaking as he walked onto the stage.

But as soon as he started playing, his nervousness disappeared. The audience clapped and cheered, and afterward, several classmates told him how amazing his performance was. Youssef realized that trying something scary, with a good friend by his side, was worth it after all.
